topic: What a sitemap is and why Google cares
caption:
Google can't rank a page it doesn't know exists.
A sitemap fixes that. It's a simple file that maps out your whole site for search engines.
Most small business sites in the High Desert are missing one.
We build every site with one already in place.
DM us SITE and let's talk. Link in bio.

#LocalSEO #HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #WebDesign #SmallBusinessOwner #VeteranOwned #WebsiteDesign #SitemapSEO #GoogleSearch #SearchVisibility
alt_text: Bold text graphic reading 'Google Can't Index What It Can't Find' with a simple sitemap diagram showing linked pages on a dark background.

copy.headline: Google Can't Index What It Can't Find
copy.body: A sitemap is a file that lists every page on your site. It tells Google what exists so your business actually shows up in search.
copy.caption:
Google can't rank a page it doesn't know exists.

We build every site with one already in place.
